response: The 2007 documentary *Zoo* was more successful than the 1998 documentary *Divine Trash*. *Zoo*, released in 2007, premiered at the Sundance Film Festival and was one of 16 winners out of 856 candidates. It was later selected as one of the top five American films to be presented at the Directors' Fortnight sidebar at the 2007 Cannes Film Festival. In contrast, *Divine Trash*, directed by Steve Yeager in 1998, is a documentary about John Waters and his work. While both films are notable in their own right, *Zoo* achieved greater recognition and success in its initial release and festival appearances.
